messages.content:
Create a retrieval-oriented summary for this parent section of a document.
Use the child summaries below. Mention the topics, entities, dates, tables,
figures, definitions, procedures, claims, metrics, and evidence types covered
when they are visible. Do not invent facts. Return only the summary text.

Parent:
{
  "node_id": "0114",
  "title": "模拟手游 投放趋势观察",
  "page_index": 59,
  "page_range": "59-60"
}

Child summaries:
[
  {
    "node_id": "0115",
    "title": "模拟手游 热门创意策略",
    "page_range": "60-61",
    "summary": "This section supports retrieval for questions regarding:\n- **Topics & Entities:** Popular gameplay genres in simulation mobile games (simulation management, realistic simulators, sandbox, makeup/dress-up, interactive fiction); ad creative strategies for simulation and hybrid casual games; market segments like mini-game collection platforms.\n- **Dates:** Full-year coverage and trend analysis from January 2025 to December 2025.\n- **Procedures & Creative Patterns:** Standard ad narrative structures used in 2025, specifically: (1) interactive choice → plot development → intentional failure → tragic ending; (2) affair/cuckold plot → problem solving → option tug-of-war → intentional failure.\n- **Claims & Future Trends:** Mini-game side modes serve as effective user-acquisition tools for simulation management games; niche themes attract higher player attention; top hybrid casual games dominate both downloads and revenue; mini-game collection platforms are rapidly overtaking competitors; fast trend-following iteration is critical for casual game breakout success.\n- **Metrics & Figures:** Monthly trends for average active ad creative volume and the percentage of new creatives launched each month in 2025. Monthly new creative percentages: Jan 44.8%, Feb 44.1%, Mar 47.2%, Apr 48.8%, May 41.7%, Jun 47.9%, Jul 51.3%, Aug 48.5%, Sep 49.1%, Oct 46.5%, Nov 46.9%, Dec 49.7%.\n- **Evidence Types:** Industry analytics sourced from GuangdaDa’s Ad Creative Module and Advertiser Analysis Module, featuring monthly performance metrics, trend charts, and observational market claims."
  }
]

message.content: This section supports retrieval for queries on advertising placement trends and creative strategies in simulation mobile games, covering the full year from January to December 2025. It addresses key topics and entities including simulation management, realistic simulators, sandbox, makeup/dress-up, interactive fiction, hybrid casual games, and mini-game collection platforms. Documented ad creative procedures detail two standard 2025 narrative patterns: (1) interactive choice → plot development → intentional failure → tragic ending, and (2) affair/cuckold plot → problem solving → option tug-of-war → intentional failure. Key claims indicate that mini-game side modes function as effective user-acquisition tools, niche themes drive higher player attention, top hybrid casual titles dominate downloads and revenue, mini-game collection platforms are rapidly gaining market share, and fast trend-following iteration is critical for casual game breakout success. Metrics and figures track monthly average active ad creative volume and the percentage of new creatives launched throughout 2025, with specific monthly new creative rates provided (Jan 44.8%, Feb 44.1%, Mar 47.2%, Apr 48.8%, May 41.7%, Jun 47.9%, Jul 51.3%, Aug 48.5%, Sep 49.1%, Oct 46.5%, Nov 46.9%, Dec 49.7%). Evidence is sourced from GuangdaDa’s Ad Creative Module and Advertiser Analysis Module, utilizing industry analytics, monthly performance metrics, trend charts, and observational market claims.

response_text: This section supports retrieval for queries on advertising placement trends and creative strategies in simulation mobile games, covering the full year from January to December 2025. It addresses key topics and entities including simulation management, realistic simulators, sandbox, makeup/dress-up, interactive fiction, hybrid casual games, and mini-game collection platforms. Documented ad creative procedures detail two standard 2025 narrative patterns: (1) interactive choice → plot development → intentional failure → tragic ending, and (2) affair/cuckold plot → problem solving → option tug-of-war → intentional failure. Key claims indicate that mini-game side modes function as effective user-acquisition tools, niche themes drive higher player attention, top hybrid casual titles dominate downloads and revenue, mini-game collection platforms are rapidly gaining market share, and fast trend-following iteration is critical for casual game breakout success. Metrics and figures track monthly average active ad creative volume and the percentage of new creatives launched throughout 2025, with specific monthly new creative rates provided (Jan 44.8%, Feb 44.1%, Mar 47.2%, Apr 48.8%, May 41.7%, Jun 47.9%, Jul 51.3%, Aug 48.5%, Sep 49.1%, Oct 46.5%, Nov 46.9%, Dec 49.7%). Evidence is sourced from GuangdaDa’s Ad Creative Module and Advertiser Analysis Module, utilizing industry analytics, monthly performance metrics, trend charts, and observational market claims.
